text:
Section C: Complete this section before the first appointment
Estimate of costs that will be incurred after the first appointment up to and including the date of the
FDR appointment if the case does not settle at the first appointment.
Prescribed rates for Indemnity rate
Part 5 publicly funded services
£ £
15. Financial remedy solicitors' costs (including VAT)
to be incurred.
16. Disbursements (including VAT, if appropriate) to be
incurred.
17. All counsel's fees to be incurred (including VAT).
18. Total of Section C
Section D: Complete this section before the FDR appointment
Estimate of costs that will be incurred after the FDR appointment up to and including the date of the
final hearing if the case does not settle at the FDR.
Part 6
Prescribed rates for Indemnity rate
publicly funded services
£ £
19. Financial remedy solicitors' costs (including VAT)
to be incurred.
20. Disbursements (including VAT, if appropriate) to be
incurred.
21. All counsel's fees to be incurred (including VAT).
22. Total of Section D
3

Statement of truth – to be completed by a party where the party is not legally represented
I confirm that:
to the best of my knowledge and belief, the contents of this estimate of costs are true and accurate;
this estimate of costs will be filed with the court and served on each other party, in accordance with
rule 9.27 of the Family Procedure Rules 2010.
Print full name
Signed Dated D D / M M / Y Y Y Y
Statement of truth – to be completed by a party’s legal representative, where the party is legally
represented:
I confirm that:
to the best of my knowledge and belief, the contents of this estimate of costs are true and accurate;
I have discussed the contents of this estimate of costs with my client
(the applicant respondent other party in these proceedings);
this estimate of costs will be filed with the court and served on each other party, in accordance with
rule 9.27 of the Family Procedure Rules 2010.
Print full name
Name of solicitor’s firm
Signed Dated D D / M M / Y Y Y Y
Position or office held
(If signing on behalf of
firm or company)
4

metadata.title: Estimate of costs for a financial remedy hearing: Form H
metadata.description: Set out the costs of financial remedy proceedings, including costs from before and after the application was issued.
